title: junk
content:
have you ever noticed that  **junk emails**  seem to be very personalized lately? sometimes, i have to think twice before sending the message to trash -- not certain that it's really a junk or it's a valid email. but some of them are just plain  **insult!**  just a moment ago, i got this message in my box.

!/gallery/misc/junk_s.png!


THAT IS NOT ACCEPTABLE!!! :D
